introSection.heading: Om Os
introSection.bodyText: Bag Argilla sidder et dedikeret team med dyb erfaring i forretningssystemer og softwareudvikling. Vi tror på at de bedste løsninger opstår i tæt samarbejde med vores kunder, og at teknologi skal tjene forretningen, ikke omvendt.

missionSection.title: Vores Mission
missionSection.leftDescription: Hos Argilla tror vi på, at alle virksomheder – uanset størrelse – fortjener adgang til professionelle digitale værktøjer. Vores platform giver dig mulighed for at bygge, tilpasse og skalere applikationer hurtigt og effektivt, uden at du behøver en stor IT-afdeling bag dig.
missionSection.rightDescription: Vi bygger fremtidens forretningssoftware – ikke kun til de store spillere, men til alle der vil vækste smart. Med Argilla får din virksomhed de samme digitale muskler som markedets største aktører, til en pris og kompleksitet der giver mening.

factsSection.title: Vores Historie
factsSection.description: Argilla blev grundlagt af et team med dyb erfaring inden for enterprise-software og forretningsautomatisering. Vi har set på nærmeste hold, hvor tidskrævende og dyrt det kan være at bygge og vedligeholde skræddersyede systemer – og vi besluttede os for at gøre det anderledes. Med Argilla får danske virksomheder en moderne, fleksibel platform, der vokser med deres behov.

lineItems.title: Erfaring der tæller
lineItems.body: Vi bringer mange års hands-on erfaring fra enterprise-branchen ind i en moderne SaaS-platform. Det betyder, at Argilla ikke bare er bygget til udviklere – det er bygget til de mennesker, der rent faktisk skal bruge det i hverdagen.

lineItems.title: Enkel onboarding, hurtige resultater
lineItems.body: Kom i gang på få dage – ikke måneder. Vores platform er intuitiv og kræver minimal opsætning, så dit team kan fokusere på at bygge løsninger frem for at kæmpe med infrastruktur.

lineItems.title: Bygget til danske virksomheder
lineItems.body: Vi kender det danske marked og de udfordringer, mellemstore og store virksomheder møder. Argilla er designet til at passe ind i de arbejdsgange og strukturer, der allerede eksisterer i din organisation.

lineItems.title: Skalerbarhed uden kompromis
lineItems.body: Uanset om du er en vækstvirksomhed eller en etableret organisation, skalerer Argilla med dig. Du betaler for det du bruger, og udvider nemt når behovene ændrer sig.

employeeCardSection.heading: Teamet
employeeCardSection.bodyText: Bag Argilla sidder et dedikeret team med dyb erfaring i forretningssystemer og softwareudvikling. Vi tror på at de bedste løsninger opstår i tæt samarbejde med vores kunder, og at teknologi skal tjene forretningen, ikke omvendt.

introSection.heading: About Us
introSection.bodyText: Behind Argilla sits a dedicated team with deep experience in business systems and software development. We believe the best solutions arise through close collaboration with our clients, and that technology should serve the business — not the other way around.

missionSection.title: Our Mission
missionSection.leftDescription: At Argilla, we believe that every company — regardless of size — deserves access to professional digital tools. Our platform enables you to build, customise and scale applications quickly and efficiently, without needing a large IT department behind you.
missionSection.rightDescription: We are building the business software of the future — not just for the big players, but for everyone who wants to grow smart. With Argilla, your company gains the same digital capabilities as the market's largest players, at a price and complexity level that makes sense.

factsSection.title: Our Story
factsSection.description: Argilla was founded by a team with deep experience in enterprise software and business automation. We have seen first-hand how time-consuming and costly it can be to build and maintain custom systems — and we decided to do things differently. With Argilla, Danish companies get a modern, flexible platform that grows with their needs.

lineItems.title: Experience that matters
lineItems.body: We bring many years of hands-on experience from the enterprise world into a modern SaaS platform. That means Argilla is not just built for developers — it is built for the people who actually use it day to day.

lineItems.title: Simple onboarding, fast results
lineItems.body: Get started in days — not months. Our platform is intuitive and requires minimal setup, so your team can focus on building solutions rather than fighting with infrastructure.

lineItems.title: Built for Danish companies
lineItems.body: We know the Danish market and the challenges that mid-sized and large companies face. Argilla is designed to fit into the workflows and structures that already exist in your organisation.

lineItems.title: Scalability without compromise
lineItems.body: Whether you are a growing company or an established organisation, Argilla scales with you. You pay for what you use, and can easily expand as your needs change.

employeeCardSection.heading: The Team
employeeCardSection.bodyText: Behind Argilla sits a dedicated team with deep experience in business systems and software development. We believe the best solutions arise through close collaboration with our clients, and that technology should serve the business — not the other way around.
